changes.motivation: vault login -method=oidc always binds its OAuth2 callback listener to port 8250 by default, causing resource contention and failures when multiple processes attempt OIDC authentication in parallel (e.g. concurrent Terragrunt runs).
changes.summary: Modified src/util/vault/getVaultToken.ts to import the existing getOpenPort utility and pass a dynamically allocated ephemeral port via the port=<n> K=V argument to vault login. Each parallel authentication attempt now gets its own unique port, eliminating the bind conflict.
